title: Amr Ibrahim
compiled_truth: Amr Ibrahim is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-23 to 2002-01-11), Amr Ibrahim sent 78 and received 278 emails, totalling 356 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (60), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (33), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (27), [Alberto Levy](people/alberto-levy) (25), [Janine Migden](people/janine-migden) (23).
